body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Big cleanup of the longruns!

closes #1360

## Content
### Cleanup of existing runs
- [x] Remove all "Slabplanet_X" runs - these are testing the same increase in complexity as the "TARGET IDEALIZED" runs, but with a simpler atmosphere.
- [x] Exception: move `slabplanet_terra` and `slabplanet_aqua` runs to regular CI, just to test we can setup + run these configurations
- [x] Remove first 2 "TARGET IDEALIZED" runs - these are running components independently (no coupling) or with fixed ocean T, which are not physically meaningful runs we need to see weekly
- [x] Decrease `t_end` of "TARGET IDEALIZED" runs so they finish within the 1 day time limit
- [x] Rename all "TARGET IDEALIZED" runs to be more descriptive (e.g. Slabplanet with ED only diffusion, 0M)
- [x] Rename anything that uses "target" to be more meaningful
- [x] Move standalone atmos config file to `config/longrun_configs/`

### Runs to add
- [x] ED only with integrated land (analogous to the current `amip_target_topo.yml`) - run for 4 months only since sim crashes after that
- [x] diag. EDMF with integrated land (analogous to the current `amip_target_topo_diagedmf.yml`) - run for 2 months only since sim crashes after that
- [x] decay with height diffusion with integrated land and bucket - this is less of a target than the previous 2 setups, but is currently more stable. We will add it to make sure it doesn't become less stable as time goes on. Can try running for 3 years on GPU (should be within time limit)
- [x] 1M microphysics with bucket - similar to `amip_target.yml` (now `amip_edonly.yml`) but using atmos config `longrun_aquaplanet_allsky_1M.yml` instead of `0M`
title: longruns ~ overhaul ~
